props.name: animateBy
props.description: Determines whether to animate by 'words' or 'letters'.

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction from which the words/letters appear ('top' or 'bottom').

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay between animations for each word/letter (in ms).

props.name: stepDuration
props.description: The time taken for each letter/word to animate (in seconds).

props.name: threshold
props.description: Intersection threshold for triggering the animation.

props.name: rootMargin
props.description: Root margin for the intersection observer.

props.name: onAnimationComplete
props.description: Callback function triggered when all animations complete.
